name: Weather Dashboard
shortDescription: A responsive app showing current weather and forecasts.
description: A weather dashboard built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. It uses API data to show current conditions, hourly forecasts, and styling that adapts to any device.

name: Test Project
shortDescription: A demo project with a clean card layout and modal details.
description: This sample project shows how the portfolio page will display each folder inside Projects. It includes a modal, tags, and image preview.
